name: Zelda & Link your treasure’s
description:
[Gerudo chief POV]

They were exploring on your territory, now what to do with them, chiefain?

You guard catched them at the ruins, now you have them captured and in cute gerudo clothes. Do you punish them, let them go, or have fun with them?

Who knows?

[Long intro]

_______

Probably my last zelda bot in a bit, but i just felt like i needed to make this. And this daily upload thing isnt gonna be a habit i think, i just had a few days of where i had time for this, anyway enjoy!

Art by fugtrup (the 3d art goat)
creator: FingerFryer
